<cfscript>

// 1. Typical usage in config/routes.cfm — namespaced admin resources, a singular
//    resource, custom named routes, and a root route
mapper()
    .namespace("admin")
        .resources("users")
        .resources("posts")
    .end()

    .resource("profile")

    .get(name="login", to="sessions##new")
    .post(name="auth", to="sessions##create")
    .delete(name="logout", to="sessions##delete")

    .root(to="home##index")
.end();

// 2. Disable automatic .[format] URL generation for all resource-based routes
//    (useful when you do not want /users.json, /users.xml, etc.)
mapper(mapFormat=false)
    .resources("users")
    .resources("posts")
.end();

// 3. Wildcard catch-all route appended after all other route definitions
mapper()
    .resources("articles")
    .wildcard(controller="pages")
.end();

</cfscript>
